India.title: Anantapur set to become garbage-free with new waste processing plant

India.title: Kumkis to be deployed to reduce elephant-human conflict in Manyam

India.title: Student of Shaheen science college scores 653 in NEET; college expects 448 MBBS seats
India.summary: Students of the Shaheen Undergraduate Science College, Bidar, have made remarkable performances in the National Eligibility-cum-Entrance Test (NEET), with Muhammad Sajid Akbar emerging as the institution’s top scorer with 653 marks

Nepal.title: Landslides and floods block nine highways
Nepal.summary: Key road links across Koshi and Bagmati provinces have been shut or partially reopened as authorities warn travellers to check road conditions before setting out.

Nepal.summary: The education reformer and environmental activist has emerged as the unlikely leader of a youth movement challenging Narendra Modi's government over examination paper leaks, with his hunger strike drawing nationwide support.

Nepal.title: Cervical cancer screening in Kathmandu finds 90 women positive for HPV
Nepal.summary: While the HPV vaccine included in the routine immunisation list targets types 16 and 18, recent screening shows infections with multiple HPV types, including those not covered by the vaccine.

Nepal.title: Justice remains elusive for Saptari couple caught in usury trap
Nepal.summary: An elderly couple say they repaid nearly Rs1.6 million on loans worth Rs480,000, but their mortgaged land remains out of reach.

Nepal.title: Andy Burnham to become prime minister, pledging to ‘rewire Britain’
Nepal.summary: Burnham will use his first speech to set ​out a path for “a more stable and responsible politics”, his office said in a statement.

Nepal.title: Nepal’s fastest man had to do it without Nepal
Nepal.summary: Between day-job spreadsheets and borrowed tracks, self-coached sprinter Aayush Kunwar quietly rewrote Nepal’s athletic history.

Nepal.title: PM Shah to break self-imposed rule with separate meetings with Indian, Chinese envoys
Nepal.summary: The prime minister will separately meet Srivastava and Zhang this week after the government completed its first 100 days.

Nepal.title: Chief Minister Shah weighs confidence vote as Sudurpashchim sinks deeper into budget crisis
Nepal.summary: Reduced to a minority after the UML withdrew support, the chief minister is banking on talks in Kathmandu as the province remains trapped in a fiscal vacuum.

Nepal.title: Hamas names Khalil Al-Hayya as new leader, statement says

World Conflicts.title: Searching for closure: Venezuela families refuse to give up after quakes
World Conflicts.summary: Weeks after earthquakes, relatives are still searching for bodies of loved ones who disappeared beneath the rubble.

World Conflicts.title: Japan’s AI gamble: Can technology offset the cost of an ageing society?
World Conflicts.summary: From underground networks to emerging AI start-ups, Japan is testing whether its greatest issue can be an opportunity.

World Conflicts.title: ASEAN diplomats voice ‘serious concern’ over Iran war and energy crisis
World Conflicts.summary: Southeast Asian countries are highly affected by oil supply shortages caused by Iran war and Strait of Hormuz closure.

World Conflicts.summary: Clashes between police and people protesting Italy arrest death

World Conflicts.title: India tunnel collapse at a hydropower project kills 10 as 17 remain missing
World Conflicts.summary: Rescue teams have been struggling to reach the 17 people trapped because of hazardous conditions inside the tunnel.
